narrative:
Whitewater Twp. township has 4,291 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points.
